name: range_trading_rsi_bbands
description: Trade sideways markets by fading moves near support and resistance with RSI and Bollinger confirmation.
entry_rules: Buy near support when RSI shows oversold conditions and price is stretched below its average
Sell near resistance when RSI shows overbought conditions and price is stretched above its average
Require the range boundaries to be visible and recently respected
exit_rules: Take profit near the middle or opposite side of the range
Place stops just outside the range boundary
Exit immediately if a real breakout closes beyond the range
research_notes: This fills a major gap in the current bot, which is more trend/breakout biased.
A regime detector can route signals here when volatility compresses and directional conviction fades.
